calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement, Class Counsel Fees Payment, Class Counsel Litigation Expenses Payment, And Class Representative Service Payment; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Jun-09-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR FINAL APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT, CLASS COUNSEL FEES PAYMENT, CLASS COUNSEL LITIGATION EXPENSES PAYMENT, AND CLASS REPRESENTATIVE SERVICE PAYMENT

Appearances via Zoom:
Haig Hogdanian of the Justice Law Corporation (818.230.7502) for plaintiff and moving party;
Carolyn Hall of Ogletree Deakins Nash Smoak & Stewart (415.442.4810) for defendant and responding party.

Discussed. There are no objectors present in the courtroom. The court rules as follows: The unopposed motion is granted. The proposed order granting final approval and the proposed judgment should be separated. Plaintiff shall revise and resubmit, and shall comply with Rule of Court 3.1312. In addition, the proposed order will set a compliance hearing date of June 15, 2027, and require the settlement administrator to submit a declaration one week in advance about the status of payments. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)

FINAL APPROVAL HEARING
Off Calendar Jun-09-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: FINAL APPROVAL HEARING

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Off calendar as a duplicate entry. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)

Appearances: Haig Hogdanian of Justice Law Corporation (818.230.7502) for plaintiff and moving party; Jared Palmer of Ogletree Deakins Nash Smoak & Stewart, PC (415.442.4810) for defendant and responding party.

Discussed as to the date for the final approval hearing. The court modifies its ruling as follows: The unopposed motion is granted. The court will endorse the proposed order submitted with the moving papers and set the final approval hearing for June 9, 2026. Order signed. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E.
